visual_delta_summary: The first viewport now includes a compact operational evidence strip with active symbol, data route, model evidence state, REC mode, and report-only execution status before detailed panels.

benchmark_elements_applied.element: compact evidence/status strips above dense sections
benchmark_elements_applied.evidence: OperationalEvidenceStrip renders DATA ROUTE, MODEL EVIDENCE, REC MODE, and EXECUTION directly below the header.

benchmark_elements_applied.element: sharper active-state contrast and understated card elevation
benchmark_elements_applied.evidence: Each evidence card uses a colored top border, stronger value text, and subtle shadow while preserving the dark dashboard palette.

benchmark_elements_applied.element: operational warnings prominent, secondary scores visible for audit
benchmark_elements_applied.evidence: REPORT ONLY and no broker order language is visible before the score panels and recommendation card details.

image_diff.summary: The top evidence strip adds visible first-viewport structure and increases page height by 35px.
